hero.name: Yonghao He
hero.tagline: I am currently leading R&D in embodied AI at D-Robotics, covering VLA/VA models, Real2Sim2Real, data collection infrastructure, 3D vision foundation models, and high-precision manipulation solutions for industrial scenarios.
about_paragraphs: I have long engaged with the frontier of artificial intelligence both as an observer and as a practitioner. Since the onset of the current wave of AI (from around 2012), I have witnessed the evolution of the technology and the industry, through to today’s flourishing entrepreneurial ecosystem driven by AI.

As a co-founder or core team member, I have helped build multiple AI-related companies across domains including security, industrial vision, autonomous driving, and, most recently, embodied AI. This experience has given me a systematic understanding of how AI advances and how industries evolve; I am adept at connecting cutting-edge research with productization and at quickly grasping the essence of complex problems.

items.degree: Ph.D in Pattern Recognition and Intelligent System
items.institution: Institute of Automation, Chinese Academy of Sciences (CASIA)
items.description: Research Areas: Computer Vision, Visual Perception, Multimodal Learning
Proficient in multi-language programming, system architecture, and software product design.
